docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,100.00 FILED BY WANG, ANGELA AS TO DEFENDANT HAMI, NESSIM DBA MELANGE DESIGNS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-26-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-26-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-26-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2009 - CONTINUED TO APR-30-2009 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. VENUE CHALLENGE DENIED. BASED UPON EVIDENCE BY BOTH DEFENDANT AND PLAINTIFF, THE COURT FINDS THAT THE SALES AGREEMENTS/CONTRACTS FOR JEWELRY WERE ENTERED INTO IN SAN FRANCISCO. THUS, THIS MATTER IS PROPERLY VENUED IN SAN FRANCISCO. TRIAL IS SET FOR APRIL 30, 2009 AT 3:30 PM. DEFENDANT MAY APPLY FOR TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD FILED BY WANG, ANGELA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WANG, ANGELA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAMI, NESSIM DBA MELANGE DESIGNS $1,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,145.00, COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF PROVED THAT SHE PREVIOUSLY PAID THE OUTSTANDING BALANCE ON HER ACCOUNT TO DEFENDANT'S EMPLOYEE JACK NAGGIAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR TRUST TAG 23866 BY DEFENDANT HAMI, NESSIM DBA MELANGE DESIGNS
JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS FILED BY PLAINTIFF WANG, ANGELA AS TO DEFENDANT HAMI, NESSIM DBA MELANGE DESIGNS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WANG, ANGELA AS TO DEFENDANT HAMI, NESSIM DBA MELANGE DESIGNS
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO FILED BY WANG, ANGELA
ORDER GRANTING THE DEFENDANT NESSIM HAMI'S REQUEST FOR TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE, FILED. COPY SENT TO DEFENDANT WITH INSTRUCTIONS ON TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE.
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT HAMI, NESSIM DBA MELANGE DESIGNS
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF WANG, ANGELA
DEFENDANT'S CORRESPONDENCE TOGETHER WITH EXHIBITS SUBMITTED FOR HIS TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE IN COURT, FILED.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-30-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-30-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. PLAINTIFF APPEARS IN COURT. DEFENDANT APPEARS BY PHONE. DEFENDANT VERBALLY STIPULATES TO A JUDGE PRO TEM: PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-30-2009 - CONTINUED TO JUN-08-2009 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE COURT REQUESTS FURTHER TESTIMONY BY BOTH PARTIES; DEFENDANT MAY APPEAR BY TELEPHONE. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
CHALLENGE TO VENUE, NOTICE SENT TO ALL PARTIES FILED BY DEFENDANT HAMI, NESSIM DBA MELANGE DESIGNS AS TO PLAINTIFF WANG, ANGELA
REQUEST FOR TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT NESSIM HAMI, RECEIVED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-08-2009 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HAMI, NESSIM DBA MELANGE DESIGNS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-13-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HAMI, NESSIM DBA MELANGE DESIGNS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-08-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-08-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. PLAINTIFF PRESENT IN COURT. DEFENDANT APPEARS BY TELEPHONE AND VERBALLY STIPULATES TO HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINITFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. ANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $1,145.00 RE 23866 FOR TRANSACTION W0509717D019 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO ANGELA WANG, DOC #1902463243, WARRANT #38003580, DATED NOV-24-2009
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
